headline: Datadog (DDOG) Among the Best Performers of May 2026
summary: ​Datadog, Inc. (NASDAQ:DDOG) has been among the top performers in May 2026 with impressive gains of more than 97%. Most of these gains came in after the company posted strong results for fiscal Q1 2026, on May 7. Datadog, Inc. (NASDAQ:DDOG) is also among our Best Performing Stocks in May.
